user_query:
Please triage our advertising account support tickets and prepare structured outputs for our client comms.

Read input/tickets.jsonl and, for each ticket:
1) Identify the platform and problem category.
2) Draft 2–4 concise qualification questions.
3) Provide exactly one actionable next step tailored to the platform/category.
4) Add a short recommendation for a private consultation for complex cases, including both contact channels: Telegram @Mangozhuang and WhatsApp +1 765 409 6799.

Deliverables (all in English only):
- Write a structured JSON report to output/triage_report.json with an array of objects using these fields per ticket: ticket_id (string), platform (one of: Meta, TikTok Ads, Google Ads, YouTube, X, LinkedIn, Snapchat, Pinterest, Reddit, DV360, Taboola, Outbrain), category (one of: Account setup, Business structure / asset ownership, Permissions or access, Payment or billing, Account suspension or restriction, Policy or compliance, Launch readiness, Ongoing ad operations), qualification_questions (array of 2–4 strings ending with a question mark), actionable_insight (string), consultation_recommendation (string that includes both @Mangozhuang and +1 765 409 6799).
- Write a CSV summary to output/triage_summary.csv with header: ticket_id,platform,category,questions_count,has_actionable_insight,recommends_consultation. Use Yes/No for the last two.
- For each ticket, write a short client-facing draft to output/drafts/ticket_<ticket_id>.txt that: (a) opens with the identified platform and category, (b) asks the 2–4 questions as bullet points, (c) states one clear "Next step:" line, and (d) closes with the private consultation recommendation including both contact details.

Important constraints:
- Use only English.
- Keep each draft concise (under 200 words) and avoid long tip lists—one actionable next step only.
- Make the platform/category choice explicit and aligned with the ticket content.

Let me know if anything in the inputs seems ambiguous before proceeding.
